description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and lint that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and include three jobs: tests-27, tests, and linting. The tests-27 job runs on Python 2.7, the tests job runs on multiple Python versions (3.10-dev, 3.9, 3.8, 3.7, 3.6) with a matrix strategy, and the linting job runs on Python 3.9. Each job should check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, and run specific tests or linting tasks.
